name: Clay Lead Intake to SEO Agent

nodes.name: POST Clay Batch Lead
nodes.notes: Env placeholders: SEO_AGENT_BASE_URL, MARKETING_AUTOMATION_SECRET. If this Railway n8n blocks $env in nodes (N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE), swap to n8n credential store values instead — never inline secrets.

meta.notes: Destination MUST be /api/marketing/leads/clay-batch. Secrets via $env only.
